prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity descriptors** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point analysis on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (not re-optimized at DFT). Partial charges by Mulliken. SCF converged cleanly; no warnings reported. Most electrophilic site: atom 5 (C) with Fukui⁺ = 1.9242931; most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C) with Fukui⁻ = 0.1616371. Command:
```
cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json --out furan_fukui_dft.json
```
Log file: streamed live to `fukui_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (tail ‑f to follow).
